title: Eva Roars
wikitext:
[]: Eva Roars             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Mar 14, 2009 10:46 am Am I the only one who thinks that Sho sounded like an organ when she roared prior to slaughtering Sachiel? I know the original was always the best, but still...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:27 am rawr

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:28 am rawr

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:33 am Raaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaawwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwrrrrrrrr fixed

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Mar 14, 2009 12:00 pm AWROoOoOoOoOoOoOoAaAaAaRrrrRRrrRrrRRrrRRrWaWaAaWawaWa

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 14, 2009 12:13 pm The roars in Rebuild sound the same as in the original. There's this mechanical-sounding thing at first, but then the roars are all like they were before.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Mar 14, 2009 12:17 pm Actually in the scene where Unit-01 fighting Sachiel doesn't unit-01 show more grunts, grows, and what not when compared to the original scene?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Mar 14, 2009 12:20 pm in the original theres only one roar, rebuild yui is just scary with all her grunts

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Sun Mar 15, 2009 1:58 pm

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Mar 15, 2009 8:23 pm I think Reichu had written in the Eva Commentary Project (not sure where) that you can actually do that roar yourself. All you need is some voice-twisting computer program.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 18, 2009 8:00 pm NAveryW wrote: The roars in Rebuild sound the same as in the original.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Mar 18, 2009 8:08 pm The roars sounded less mechanical but... not something you would expect an Eva to sound like.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 18, 2009 8:16 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: The roars sounded less mechanical but... not something you would expect an Eva to sound like.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:21 pm ^ I'd say go for it. It'd be a lot easier for people to make very quick comparisons.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:32 pm I didn't like it. All the grunting was too much for me. Makes me cringe to think about the Zeruel fight. OM NOM NOM

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:38 pm wait, they changed the roars for the dub? wtf

[]:             Quote Post by Tsachoul » Thu Mar 19, 2009 1:17 am Yeah, I believe that the original roars were part of the Japanese voice track, so they had to re-create them for the dub.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Mar 19, 2009 2:35 am cut and paste you damn dubbing morons! ”あんたばか？”

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Sat Mar 21, 2009 3:44 pm I didn't like Yui's new voice at all. The mechanical sound took away from what made the original so creepy and effective, the contrast to the "robot". It was raw, organic, animalistic -- berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:53 pm The roar for Eva 01 in 1.0 isnt totally bad.But I'd would of perfered that they kept the Japanese roar instead of getting some guy to do it.The Japanese roar gives you the feeling that the Eva is more human then robot like the series.The english one sounds,just meh.
